title: Basic JavaScript Singleton and Factory
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Singleton and Factory. Focus on implementing Singleton with module pattern correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Singleton and Factory
description: Create a function that uses Singleton with module pattern and Singleton with class together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Singleton and Factory Project
description: Build a small application that applies Singleton with module pattern, Singleton with class, Lazy initialization in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Singleton and Factory
description: The following code has bugs related to Singleton with module pattern. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Singleton and Factory
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Singleton with module pattern and Singleton with class.
